source: DFM AI Tool Wish List — Consultant Brief, March 2026

high_priority.name: Predictive Retention Scoring
high_priority.description: Script → predicted retention curve, drop-off flags, improvement suggestions.

high_priority.name: Competitive Outlier Ideation Engine
high_priority.description: Monitor ~20 competitor channels; surface outlier content with theme/format/timing analysis.

high_priority.name: Visual Packaging & Thumbnail Intelligence
high_priority.description: Competitor thumbnail analysis + script→thumbnail text suggestions.

high_priority.name: Competitor A/B Test Monitor
high_priority.description: Detect competitor title/thumbnail/description changes + performance delta; Slack alerts.

high_priority.name: Frame.io Comment Sentiment Analyzer
high_priority.description: Video-level and client-level sentiment; alerts when below threshold.

high_priority.name: Automated Video QC Checker
high_priority.description: Video vs client checklist → timestamped error report.

high_priority.name: Claude-to-ClickUp Agent
high_priority.description: Natural language → create/update ClickUp tasks with correct fields and routing.

medium_priority.name: Packaging Tension Scorer
medium_priority.description: Title + thumbnail → score + roast-style feedback (e.g. Slack command).

medium_priority.name: Client-Specific Knowledge Bases
medium_priority.description: Claude Projects per client: brand voice, scripts, performance data.

medium_priority.name: AI-Assisted Script Voice Matching
medium_priority.description: Draft script → match client voice and delivery style.

medium_priority.name: Slack-Based Predictive Scoring Bot
medium_priority.description: Post title/hook in Slack → instant predictive score (1-10).

medium_priority.name: Client-Specific Outlier Aggregator
medium_priority.description: Per-client dashboard of outlier content in their niche.

medium_priority.name: Timeline Calculator
medium_priority.description: Content type, deliverables, complexity, turnaround → schedule + milestones.

medium_priority.name: Client Psychology / Sentiment Tracker
medium_priority.description: Slack/email/Frame.io → running sentiment profile per client; escalation flags.

medium_priority.name: Slack Message Templates & Automation
medium_priority.description: Templates for kickoffs, status, revisions, reminders; auto-fill client/project.
